mentions.note: Stock down 50%, Gen-Z loves it, but management consistently fails to execute. Too hard to own; skip it.
Gaming platform hit hard after Google's Project Genie announcement; rallied post-earnings but given back gains; AI-powered game creation real threat to creator economics.
Down ~50% from highs; good company but lost money (market no longer wants money-losers); speculative position only, wait for profitability catalyst.
